sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Both source blocks are at 5 pixels. Level not complete.
# Let me try clicking on the Y bar itself to see if it does something different

action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 29, 'col': 10}])
print("Result:", last_action_result)

seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("\nSource blocks after click:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ['N', 'Y']:
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"  {n['color']} id={n['id']}: pixels={n['pixels']}, rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
